2606.29863.title: KbSD: Knowledge Boundary aware Self-Distillation for Behavioral Calibration in Agentic Search
2606.29863.paper_summary: Agentic search equips large language models with dynamic retrieval abilities, but existing reinforcement learning methods remain limited by reward sparsity in knowledge boundary calibration -- deciding when to trust parametric memory, when to rely on retrieved evidence, and when to abstain. Binary rewards can penalize undesirable outcomes, but provide little guidance on the reasoning process required to make calibrated decisions across different knowledge states. To address this, we propose KbSD (Knowledge boundary Self-Distillation), a framework that tackles this limitation through dense token-level supervision, outcome-level sparse rewards, and quadrant-adaptive optimization. KbSD constructs a hint-augmented teacher, architecturally identical to the student, that receives explicit knowledge boundary signals -- including parametric certainty, retrieval quality, and ground-truth answers -- to generate calibrated reasoning demonstrations. This information-asymmetric self-distillation enables dense supervision without requiring a larger external model. To further account for the heterogeneous reasoning distributions across knowledge states, we introduce a quadrant-adaptive distillation objective: reverse KL for concentrated integration, forward KL for diverse refusal, and Pareto-optimal bidirectional KL for asymmetric quadrants requiring both precision and coverage. Experiments on multiple benchmarks show that KbSD consistently improves both task accuracy and hallucination mitigation over strong baselines, with the largest gains appearing in the challenging quadrants where sparse rewards are least informative.
2606.29863.paper_summary_zh: 代理搜索為大型語言模型提供了動態檢索能力，但現有的強化學習方法仍然受到知識邊界校準中獎勵稀疏的限制——決定何時信任參數記憶，何時依賴檢索證據，以及何時選擇不行動。二元獎勵可以懲罰不理想的結果，但對於在不同知識狀態下做出校準決策所需的推理過程提供的指導有限。為了解決這個問題，我們提出了KbSD（知識邊界自蒸餾），這是一個通過密集的標記級監督、結果級稀疏獎勵和象限自適應優化來解決這一限制的框架。KbSD構建了一個提示增強教師，其架構與學生相同，接收明確的知識邊界信號——包括參數確定性、檢索質量和真實答案——以生成校準的推理示範。這種信息不對稱的自蒸餾使得在不需要更大外部模型的情況下實現密集監督。為了進一步考慮不同知識狀態下的異質推理分佈，我們引入了一個象限自適應蒸餾目標：反向KL用於集中整合，正向KL用於多樣拒絕，以及帕累托最優的雙向KL用於需要精確度和覆蓋率的非對稱象限。多個基準上的實驗表明，KbSD在強基準上持續提高了任務準確性和幻覺緩解，最大的增益出現在獎勵稀疏最不具信息性的挑戰性象限中。
2606.29863.author: Tao Feng et.al.
2606.29863.authors: Tao Feng, Xinke Jiang, Chao Wu
